form.label: Trellix ePO Security Command Center
form.description: Comprehensive security dashboard for Trellix (McAfee) ePO telemetry - Endpoint inventory, agent health, and security monitoring

div.p: This dashboard displays data from enabled ePO inputs. Panels showing "No results" indicate those data sources are not configured or have no data. Check Settings - Data Inputs - Trellix ePO to enable additional inputs like threat_events, malware_detections, etc.

search.query: | eventcount summarize=false index=* | dedup index | sort index | table index
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:*" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | stats count by host | sort -count | head 50

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | stats dc(host) as total_hosts

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval os='EPOComputerProperties.OSType' | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | search os="Windows*" | stats count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval os='EPOComputerProperties.OSType' | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | search os="*Linux*" OR os="*linux*" | stats count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:agent_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval managed='EPOLeafNode.ManagedState' | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | where managed=1 | stats count
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:*" | stats count as total_events

div.style: background: #e8f4fd; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Threat Status Summary - Escalated, Unresolved, and Resolved threats. Requires threat_summary input.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_summary" | eval threat_status=coalesce(threatStatus, threat_status) | search threat_status="Escalated" | stats dc(host) as escalated_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_summary" | eval threat_status=coalesce(threatStatus, threat_status) | search threat_status="Unresolved" OR threat_status="Active" | stats count as unresolved_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_summary" | eval threat_status=coalesce(threatStatus, threat_status) | eval resolution_type=coalesce(resolutionType, resolution_type) | search threat_status="Resolved" resolution_type="Advanced" | stats count as resolved_advanced

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_summary" | eval threat_status=coalesce(threatStatus, threat_status) | eval resolution_type=coalesce(resolutionType, resolution_type) | search threat_status="Resolved" resolution_type="Basic" | stats count as resolved_basic

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_summary" | eval action=coalesce(action, action_taken, "N/A") | search action="Report*" OR action="Observe*" OR action="Log*" | stats count as report_only

div.style: background: #e8f4fd; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Software Deployment Status - Product coverage and version distribution. Requires software_status input.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:software_status" | eval product_name=coalesce(productName, product_name, product_code, "Unknown") | eval install_count=coalesce(installCount, install_count, 1) | stats sum(install_count) as installations by product_name | sort -installations | head 10
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:software_status" | eval status=coalesce(deploymentStatus, status, "Unknown") | stats count by status

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:software_status" | eval product_name=coalesce(productName, product_name, product_code, "Unknown") | eval product_version=coalesce(productVersion, product_version, "N/A") | eval install_count=coalesce(installCount, install_count, 1) | stats sum(install_count) as "Installations" by product_name, product_version | sort -Installations | rename product_name as "Product", product_version as "Version" | head 15

div.style: background: #e8f4fd; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Device Health - Check-in failures and protection status. Requires device_management input.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:device_management" | eval days_since_checkin=coalesce(daysSinceCheckin, days_since_checkin, 0) | where days_since_checkin > 7 | stats dc(host) as checkin_failures

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:device_management" | eval protection_status=coalesce(protectionStatus, protection_status, "Unknown") | search protection_status="Unprotected" | stats dc(host) as unprotected_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:device_management" | eval reboot_pending=coalesce(rebootPending, reboot_pending, "false") | search reboot_pending="true" OR reboot_pending=1 | stats dc(host) as reboot_pending_count
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:device_management" | eval protection_status=coalesce(protectionStatus, protection_status, "Unknown") | dedup host | stats count by protection_status

div.style: background: #e8f4fd; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Data Loss Prevention - DLP incidents and policy violations. Requires dlp_incidents input.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:dlp_incidents" | stats count as total_incidents

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:dlp_incidents" | eval severity=coalesce(severity, "Unknown") | stats count by severity | eval sort_order=case(severity="Critical",1, severity="High",2, severity="Medium",3, severity="Low",4, true(),5) | sort sort_order | fields - sort_order
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:dlp_incidents" | eval rule_name=coalesce(ruleName, rule_name, "Unknown") | stats count as triggers by rule_name | sort -triggers | head 5

div.style: background: #e8f4fd; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Compliance Overview - Security content compliance. Requires compliance_overview input.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:compliance_overview" | eval compliance_status=coalesce(complianceStatus, compliance_status, "Unknown") | search compliance_status="Compliant" | stats dc(host) as compliant_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:compliance_overview" | eval compliance_status=coalesce(complianceStatus, compliance_status, "Unknown") | search compliance_status="Non-Compliant" | stats dc(host) as non_compliant_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:compliance_overview" | eval content_type=coalesce(contentType, content_type, "Unknown") | eval compliance_pct=coalesce(compliancePct, compliance_pct, 0) | stats avg(compliance_pct) as "Compliance %" by content_type | sort -"Compliance %"

div.style: background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Threat Intelligence Section - These panels require threat_events and malware_detections inputs to be enabled. If showing "No results", enable these inputs in Settings - Data Inputs - Trellix ePO.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_events" OR sourcetype="trellix_epo:malware_detections" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ severity="$filter_severity$" | timechart span=1h count by severity | fillnull value=0

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_events" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ severity="$filter_severity$" | stats count as threat_count by threat_type | sort -threat_count | head 10

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:malware_detections" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ | stats count as detection_count by malware_name | sort -detection_count | head 10

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_events" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ severity="$filter_severity$" | stats count by severity | eval sort_order=case(severity="Critical", 1, severity="High", 2, severity="Medium", 3, severity="Low", 4, true(), 5) | sort sort_order | fields - sort_order

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:malware_detections" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ file_hash=* | stats count as detections, dc(host) as affected_hosts, values(malware_name) as malware_names, latest(file_path) as file_path, latest(_time) as last_seen by file_hash | sort -detections | head 15 | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | rename file_hash as "File Hash", detections as "Detections", affected_hosts as "Affected Hosts", malware_names as "Malware", file_path as "File Path", last_seen as "Last Seen"

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:agent_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval managed_state='EPOLeafNode.ManagedState' | eval agent_status=case(managed_state=1, "Managed", managed_state=0, "Unmanaged", true(), "Unknown") | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | stats count by agent_status

index=$index_filter$ (sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" OR sourcetype="trellix_epo:agent_status") | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval agent_version=coalesce('EPOLeafNode.AgentVersion', agentVersion, "Unknown") | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | stats count as host_count by agent_version | sort -host_count | head 10

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval os='EPOComputerProperties.OSType' | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | rex field=os "(?<os_family>Windows|Linux|macOS|Mac OS|Darwin)" | eval os_family=if(isnull(os_family) OR os_family="", "Other", os_family) | stats count by os_family

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:host_status" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | eval ip=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.IPAddress', ipAddress, "N/A") | eval os=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.OSType', osType, "Unknown") | eval user=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.UserName', userName, "N/A") | eval domain=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.DomainName', domainName, "N/A") | eval agent_ver=coalesce('EPOLeafNode.AgentVersion', agentVersion, "N/A") | eval last_update='EPOLeafNode.LastUpdate' | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | table host, ip, os, domain, user, agent_ver, last_update | rename host as "Hostname", ip as "IP Address", os as "OS", domain as "Domain", user as "User", agent_ver as "Agent Version", last_update as "Last Update" | sort Hostname | head 50

index=$index_filter$ (sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_events" OR sourcetype="trellix_epo:malware_detections") | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ severity="$filter_severity$" | stats count as total_threats, dc(threat_type) as threat_types, dc(malware_name) as unique_malware, latest(severity) as last_severity, latest(_time) as last_threat_time by host | sort -total_threats | head 20 | eval last_threat_time=strftime(last_threat_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | rename host as "Host", total_threats as "Total Threats", threat_types as "Threat Types", unique_malware as "Unique Malware", last_severity as "Last Severity", last_threat_time as "Last Threat"

div.style: background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Policy Compliance Section - These panels require the policy_compliance input to be enabled.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:policy_compliance" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ | dedup host | stats count by compliance_status | eval compliance_status=if(isnull(compliance_status), "Unknown", compliance_status)

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:policy_compliance" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ (compliance_status="Non-Compliant" OR compliance_status="Violation") | timechart span=1h sum(violation_count) as violations

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:policy_compliance" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ (compliance_status="Non-Compliant" OR compliance_status="Violation") | stats sum(violation_count) as total_violations, dc(host) as affected_hosts by policy_name | sort -total_violations | head 10

div.style: background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: User Activity Section - These panels require the user_actions input to be enabled.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:user_actions" | stats count as action_count by user | sort -action_count | head 10
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:user_actions" | stats count by action | sort -count | head 10
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:user_actions" | timechart span=1h count by result

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:user_actions" | sort -_time | head 50 | eval _time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table _time, user, action, result, object, src_ip | rename _time as "Time", user as "User", action as "Action", result as "Result", object as "Object", src_ip as "Source IP"

div.style: background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 15px; margin: 10px 0;

html.div: Advanced Analytics Section - These panels require threat_events and quarantine_events inputs to be enabled.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:threat_events" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ severity="$filter_severity$" | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | eval day=strftime(_time, "%A") | stats count as threat_count by day, hour | eval day_num=case(day="Sunday", 0, day="Monday", 1, day="Tuesday", 2, day="Wednesday", 3, day="Thursday", 4, day="Friday", 5, day="Saturday", 6) | sort day_num, hour | fields - day_num | xyseries day hour threat_count

index=$index_filter$ sourcetype="trellix_epo:quarantine_events" | eval host=coalesce('EPOComputerProperties.ComputerName', computerName, host) | search $filter_host$ | timechart span=1h count by quarantine_action

div.p: Trellix ePO Security Command Center | Data refreshes automatically | Powered by Splunk
For configuration help, visit Settings → Data Inputs → Trellix ePO Input
